sentences.target: Ajoute une légende à la photo.

translations.fr: Ajoute une légende à la photo.
translations.en: Add a caption to the photo.
translations.es: Añade un pie de foto a la foto.
translations.de: Füge dem Foto eine Bildunterschrift hinzu.
translations.nl: Voeg een onderschrift toe aan de foto.
translations.nb: Legg til en bildetekst til bildet.
translations.sv: Lägg till en bildtext till bilden.
translations.ja: 写真にキャプションを追加して。

tokens.explanation: Main verb, imperative 2nd person singular; orders the action of adding; selects a direct object NP (“une légende”) and a prepositional complement (“à la photo”).
Indefinite article, feminine singular; determiner of “légende”.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of “Ajoute”; here refers to a caption.
Preposition introducing a prepositional complement; marks the target (“à la photo”).
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of “photo”.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition “à”.

sentences.target: La légende explique les couleurs sur la carte.
sentences.reading: /la leʒɑ̃d ɛksplik le kulœʁ syʁ la kaʁt/

translations.fr: La légende explique les couleurs sur la carte.
translations.ipa: /la leʒɑ̃d ɛksplik le kulœʁ syʁ la kaʁt/
translations.en: The legend explains the colors on the map.
translations.es: La leyenda explica los colores del mapa.
translations.de: Die Legende erklärt die Farben auf der Karte.
translations.it: La legenda spiega i colori sulla mappa.
translations.zh-Hans: 图例解释了地图上的颜色。
translations.yue: 圖例解釋地圖上的顏色。
translations.pt: A legenda explica as cores no mapa.
translations.vi: Chú giải giải thích các màu trên bản đồ.
translations.ar: مفتاح الخريطة يوضح الألوان على الخريطة.
translations.nl: De legenda legt de kleuren op de kaart uit.
translations.hu: A jelmagyarázat a térkép színeit magyarázza.
translations.hi: मानचित्र की कुंजी रंगों को समझाती है.
translations.el: Το υπόμνημα εξηγεί τα χρώματα στον χάρτη.
translations.ro: Legenda explică culorile de pe hartă.
translations.ja: 凡例は地図の色を説明する。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of the subject noun “légende”.
Common noun, feminine singular; head of the subject NP; here denotes the map key.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; takes a direct object (“les couleurs”) and a locative PP (“sur la carte”).
Definite article, plural; determiner of “couleurs”.
Common noun, plural; direct object of “explique”.
Preposition introducing a locative complement (“sur la carte”).
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of “carte”.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition “sur”.

sentences.target: Cette histoire est une légende du village.
sentences.reading: /sɛt istwaʁ ɛ tyn leʒɑ̃d dy vilaʒ/

translations.fr: Cette histoire est une légende du village.
translations.ipa: /sɛt istwaʁ ɛ tyn leʒɑ̃d dy vilaʒ/
translations.en: This story is a legend from the village.
translations.es: Esta historia es una leyenda del pueblo.
translations.de: Diese Geschichte ist eine Legende aus dem Dorf.
translations.it: Questa storia è una leggenda del villaggio.
translations.zh-Hans: 这个故事是村里的传说。
translations.yue: 呢個故事係村裡嘅傳說。
translations.pt: Esta história é uma lenda da aldeia.
translations.vi: Câu chuyện này là một truyền thuyết của làng.
translations.nl: Dit verhaal is een legende uit het dorp.
translations.hu: Ez a történet a falu legendája.
translations.hi: यह कहानी गाँव की एक दंतकथा है.
translations.el: Αυτή η ιστορία είναι ένας θρύλος του χωριού.
translations.nb: Denne historien er en legende fra landsbyen.
translations.id: Kisah ini adalah legenda dari desa.
translations.sv: Den här berättelsen är en legend från byn.
translations.ro: Povestea aceasta este o legendă a satului.
translations.da: Denne historie er en legende fra landsbyen.

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner, feminine singular; modifies “histoire”.
Common noun, feminine singular; head of the subject NP.
Copula, present 3rd person singular; links the subject to the predicate nominal (“une légende du village”).
Indefinite article, feminine singular; determiner of “légende”.
Common noun, feminine singular; predicate nominal identifying the subject.
Preposition; contraction of “de + le”, introducing a genitive complement (“du village”).
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition “du”.

sentences.target: Tu dois écrire la légende sous l'image.
sentences.reading: /ty dwa zekʁiʁ la leʒɑ̃d su limaʒ/

translations.fr: Tu dois écrire la légende sous l'image.
translations.ipa: /ty dwa zekʁiʁ la leʒɑ̃d su limaʒ/
translations.en: You have to write the caption under the picture.
translations.es: Debes escribir el pie de foto debajo de la imagen.
translations.de: Du musst die Bildunterschrift unter das Bild schreiben.
translations.it: Devi scrivere la didascalia sotto l'immagine.
translations.zh-Hans: 你必须在图片下写上说明文字。
translations.yue: 你要喺張相下面寫說明文字。
translations.ru: Ты должен написать подпись под изображением.
translations.pt: Você tem que escrever a legenda embaixo da imagem.
translations.he: אתה חייב לכתוב את הכיתוב מתחת לתמונה.
translations.vi: Bạn phải viết chú thích dưới ảnh.
translations.ar: يجب أن تكتب التسمية التوضيحية تحت الصورة.
translations.nl: Je moet het onderschrift onder de afbeelding schrijven.
translations.uk: Ти маєш написати підпис під зображенням.
translations.hu: A képaláírást a kép alá kell írnod.
translations.hi: तुम्हें तस्वीर के नीचे कैप्शन लिखना है.
translations.el: Πρέπει να γράψεις τη λεζάντα κάτω από την εικόνα.
translations.nb: Du må skrive bildeteksten under bildet.
translations.id: Kamu harus menulis keterangan di bawah gambar.
translations.sv: Du måste skriva bildtexten under bilden.
translations.ro: Trebuie să scrii legenda sub imagine.
translations.da: Du skal skrive billedteksten under billedet.
translations.fi: Sinun pitää kirjoittaa kuvateksti kuvan alle.
translations.ja: 画像の下にキャプションを書かなければならない。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular; subject of “dois”.
Modal verb, present indicative 2nd person singular; expresses obligation and selects the infinitive “écrire”.
Infinitive verb; complement of the modal “dois”, denoting the action to be performed.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of “légende”.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of “écrire”.
Preposition introducing a locative complement (“sous l'image”).
Cliticized definite article (elision of “le/la” before a vowel); determiner of “image”; kept as written.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition “sous”.
